purpose: Adversarial execution surface verification against current reverse-closure topology. Enumerates every classified surface from #383, verifies fail-closed invariants, and maps each adversarial category to the surfaces it exercises. Generated after #940, #383, #896, and external Cloudflare Git Integration disable.

components.VALID: object hash at /validate equals object hash at /execute
components.AUTHORIZED: authority_registry entry exists, not consumed, not expired, canonical subject
components.UNUSED: nonce not seen, object_hash not seen, execution_id not replayed
components.POLICY_VALID: session_id, continuity_id, decision_id, runtime_id all match across canonical chain

adversarial_categories.name: workflow_dispatch_bypass
adversarial_categories.description: Attempt to trigger governed-deploy.yml or prepare-governed-deploy.yml without full canonical chain traversal or with fabricated inputs
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: governed-deploy.yml checks event_name=workflow_dispatch, validates CALLER_WORKFLOW_REF, requires DECISION_ID/VALIDATED_OBJECT_HASH/INVOCATION_NONCE, verifies replay at /execute; fabricated dispatch inputs fail /compile hash match requirement

adversarial_categories.name: shell_wrapped_deploy_attempts
adversarial_categories.description: Attempt to bypass governed-deploy.ts wrapper via bash/sh/zsh -c 'wrangler deploy' patterns or direct wrangler CLI invocation
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: governed-deploy.ts enforceGovernedDeployCommand blocks (bash|sh|zsh) -c wrangler deploy patterns and direct wrangler invocation via failClosed('direct wrangler invocation rejected'); package.json deploy script exits 1

adversarial_categories.name: orphan_execution
adversarial_categories.description: Execution attempt without valid session/continuity lineage chain — detached continuity_id, missing session, or lineage chain gap
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: canonical chain requires /session → /continuity → /authority with matching session_id/continuity_id/decision_id/runtime_id across all objects; detached lineage → NULL at /authority or /compile

adversarial_categories.name: replay_reuse
adversarial_categories.description: Attempt to reuse consumed execution artifacts: seen object hash, used nonce, replayed execution_id, or duplicate proof tuple
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: seenObjectHashes set blocks duplicate object_hash; usedNonces set blocks nonce reuse; deployment_provenance_registry UNIQUE hash guard; deployment_proof_registry proof_binding_hash UNIQUE guard; governed-deploy.ts tupleCollision detection

adversarial_categories.name: stale_proof_lineage
adversarial_categories.description: Proof presented with expired authority chain, expired continuity, or authority beyond AUTHORITY_EXPIRY
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: within(now, authority.expires_at) check; AUTHORITY_EXPIRY derived dynamically from /authority response (not hardcoded); governed-deploy.yml fails closed when authority expiry missing

adversarial_categories.name: authority_reuse
adversarial_categories.description: Attempt to reuse consumed authority (authority_id in consumedAuthorities set) or expired authority
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: consumedAuthorities set blocks authority_id reuse; authority.status === CONSUMED → NULL; revoked authority → NULL

adversarial_categories.name: undeclared_registry_mutation
adversarial_categories.description: INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on a table not in the declared mutation surface inventory
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json fail_closed_response = UNDECLARED_MUTATION_SURFACE -> NULL; scanner enforces exhaustiveness against src/index.ts; 63 declared surfaces cover all known tables

adversarial_categories.name: hidden_deploy_path_discovery
adversarial_categories.description: Enumeration of surfaces that could create production mutations outside the canonical governed path, including environment promotion, preview-to-production, and ungoverned release artifacts
adversarial_categories.expected_outcome: NULL (for classified surfaces) or OPEN (for known gaps requiring external closure)
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: Cloudflare Git Integration external disable active (RCM-008 CONTAINED); no scheduled deploy workflows (RCM-007 CLOSED); all hidden paths classified in REVERSE_CLOSURE_MUTATION_MAP with bypass_risk and closure_action; OPEN surfaces require external action (#380, #382, #584)

adversarial_categories.name: proof_lineage_corruption
adversarial_categories.description: Proof with mismatched validated_object_hash vs execution_hash, detached execution lineage, or proof_id not matching persisted proof registry entry
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: validateProof: validated_object_hash === hashObject(object) AND execution_hash === hashObject(object); execution must be in executionRegistry with matching object_hash and persisted=true; persistedProofId must match proof_registry entry

adversarial_categories.name: exact_object_drift
adversarial_categories.description: Object hash at /validate differs from object hash at /execute — state mutation between validation and execution
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: validatedHash = hashObject(object) at /validate; executedHash = hashObject(executedObject) at /execute; validatedHash !== executedHash → NULL

adversarial_categories.name: mutation_after_validation
adversarial_categories.description: State change to execution object after /validate completes but before /execute registers result — post-validation mutation
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: Object hash is computed at /execute and must match hash computed at /validate; any mutation between steps changes canonical hash → NULL via exact-object enforcement

adversarial_categories.name: bypass_capable_local_terminal_execution
adversarial_categories.description: Local terminal execution bypassing governed deploy context guard — wrangler deploy with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN without MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT=github_actions_governed
adversarial_categories.expected_outcome: NULL (governed path); BREAK_GLASS (acknowledged non-normal execution with root credential)
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: governed-deploy.ts context guard exits when MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT != github_actions_governed; BREAK_GLASS classification acknowledges non-zero residual risk until token scoped to OIDC (#584 closure condition); root credential paths explicitly non-normal

adversarial_categories.name: credential_misuse_classification
adversarial_categories.description: Classification and audit verification of root credential usage paths — CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, GitHub admin credentials, Cloudflare account owner
adversarial_categories.expected_outcome: BREAK_GLASS (classified non-normal, not NULL because external constraint cannot cryptographically block)
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: RCM-010, RCM-011, RCM-019 explicitly classified BREAK_GLASS; root_authority_constraints.json root_authority_escalation=NULL; audit observable via Cloudflare dashboard and GitHub audit log; creates_legitimacy=false for all break-glass surfaces

adversarial_categories.name: reconciliation_telemetry_misuse
adversarial_categories.description: Attempt to use observability/reconciliation/telemetry surfaces to create authority, validation, execution, proof, or legitimacy
adversarial_categories.expected_outcome: NULL (cannot create authority or authorize execution)
adversarial_categories.verification_basis: RCM-020 GET-only routes; RCM-021 trigger-blocked append-only; MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json NON_EXECUTABLE classification for all observability routes; creates_authority=false, execution_capable=false, creates_legitimacy=false for all OBSERVABILITY_ONLY surfaces

fail_closed_invariant_verification.evidence: MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json fail_closed_response; src/index.ts static scan enforces 63 declared surfaces; undeclared table → UNDECLARED_MUTATION_SURFACE -> NULL
seenObjectHashes blocks duplicate object_hash; usedNonces blocks nonce reuse; deployment registries UNIQUE hash guards; tupleCollision detection in governed-deploy.ts
within(now, authority.expires_at) at /authority; AUTHORITY_EXPIRY dynamically derived from /authority response; governed-deploy.yml fails closed on missing expiry
session_id/continuity_id/decision_id/runtime_id match enforced across canonical chain; continuity chain must include authority_id and session_id; orphan execution → NULL
proof.validated_object_hash must equal hashObject(object); proof.execution_hash must equal hashObject(object); persisted proof registry must match all hash fields
exact-object enforcement: validatedHash !== executedHash → NULL; object is re-hashed at /execute and compared against /validate hash

DEPLOYMENT_TOPOLOGY_MAP.json enumerates all deploy paths; REVERSE_CLOSURE_MUTATION_MAP enumerates all 22 surfaces; no ungoverned deploy path exists outside classified surfaces; Cloudflare Git Integration external disable active
/validate is a required canonical chain step; execution without validation → missing validated_object_hash → proof hash mismatch → NULL; governed-deploy.yml requires VALIDATE_STATUS=APPROVED

cloudflare_git_integration.verification: External account-level disable confirmed active per #584/#896. Code-side containment: wrangler.toml [env.preview] isolates preview environment. CF-001 classified CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED in CLOUDFLARE_AUTHORITY_CLASSIFICATION.json. No production authority created by this surface while disabled.
cloudflare_git_integration.re_enable_risk: If Git Integration re-enabled, all subsequent push-triggered deploys bypass canonical chain — ungoverned production mutation. Observable only in Cloudflare dashboard.
cloudflare_git_integration.adversarial_outcome: CONTAINED while disabled; hidden_deploy_path_discovery category covers re-enable risk

break_glass_paths.verification: All three surfaces explicitly classified BREAK_GLASS. authority_capable=true, execution_capable=true but creates_legitimacy=false. root_authority_constraints.json root_authority_escalation=NULL. Audit observable via Cloudflare dashboard and GitHub audit log.
break_glass_paths.adversarial_outcome: credential_misuse_classification and bypass_capable_local_terminal_execution categories verified — these surfaces are non-normal execution, not NULL (cannot cryptographically constrain root credentials at repository level)

observability_surfaces.verification: RCM-020 GET-only routes; RCM-021 trigger-blocked append-only install_base_telemetry_registry. MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json NON_EXECUTABLE classification. reconciliation_telemetry_misuse adversarial category verified → NULL for all escalation attempts.

release_tag_creation.verification: No governed release/tag creation workflow exists. Tags can be created without canonical chain traversal. hidden_deploy_path_discovery category enumerates this as classified OPEN gap. Closure requires #382 release provenance boundary definition.
release_tag_creation.adversarial_outcome: OPEN — risk is classified and acknowledged, closure requires #382

branch_protection.verification: BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json is policy_only_non_enforcing. GitHub repository settings do not enforce required status checks, PR reviews, or block direct pushes to main. workflow_dispatch_bypass category enumerates this as classified OPEN gap. Closure requires external GitHub settings action per #380.
branch_protection.adversarial_outcome: OPEN — risk is classified and acknowledged, closure requires #380

CONTAINED — canonical chain + nonce + expiry; fabricated inputs blocked by /compile hash match
CONTAINED — prepare-governed-deploy has no deploy capability; tuple replay risk is residual

CONTAINED — external disable active; re-enable risk classified OBSERVABILITY_ONLY-dependent
CONTAINED — context guard + canonical legitimacy artifact required; shell-wrap blocked

BREAK_GLASS — direct wrangler bypass possible with token; classified non-normal; token scope closure in #584

CONTAINED — 7-step canonical chain enforced; all adversarial inputs verified fail-closed
CONTAINED — /proof route exclusive; evidence surfaces trigger-blocked; proof hash match required

OPEN — no publish workflow exists; linked #382; classified and acknowledged

summary.note_on_rcm022_status: RCM-022 (adversarial_verification) was OPEN in REVERSE_CLOSURE_MUTATION_MAP. It is now CLOSED because this artifact (#695 adversarial verification) is the required closure action. The test suite at tests/fate/issue-695-adversarial-execution-verification.test.mjs provides adversarial evidence.
